title: K Corp. Ampule over Totem of Undying
description: Resource pack that replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom 3D model of a K Corp. Ampule from Limbus Company
body:
**K Corp. Ampule over Totem of Undying**

Replaces the default texture of the Totem of Undying with a custom-made 3D model of a K Corp. Ampule from the game Limbus Company. Useful for those roleplaying on a Limbus Company/Lobotomy Corporation Minecraft server or for those who would enjoy a reference to a game they like. 

This is a first-time experience for me, so errors and inconsistencies within the resource pack are to be expected. If you have any trouble or would like to report a bug, please do so.

All models and textures were created by me using Blockbench.
